description: A real Flanker experiment dataset (flanker_rt_data.csv) is open in LibreOffice Calc, containing participant IDs, block numbers, trial numbers, flanker conditions, and reaction times. Sort the data by the flanker condition in ascending order. Calculate the mean reaction time for congruent trials and the mean reaction time for incongruent trials in the first two empty columns, providing descriptive headers for each. Save the changes to the file.
